title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
company: Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners:
Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kotak Mahindra Bank South Asia Partners!
